title: Li Auto Revenue Trends and Growth Analysis
text: Li Auto's revenue trends from 2020-2024 demonstrate dramatic growth before recent contraction. The company's annual revenue has grown from RMB 5.09 billion in 2020 to RMB 45.29 billion in 2022, then surging to RMB 123.85 billion in 2023 (173.5% growth). 2024 revenue reached RMB 144.46 billion, representing 16.6% year-over-year growth. However, 2025 revenue declined to RMB 112.31 billion, a 22.25% year-over-year decrease. Quarterly revenue trends show continued volatility with Q1 2025 revenue declining on a year-over-year basis, though subsequent quarters showed recovery attempts. The revenue contraction in 2025 is primarily attributable to delivery volume declines as the company faced intensified competitive pressures and transitional challenges moving from EREV to BEV platforms. Revenue per vehicle has also declined as the product mix shifted toward lower-priced models. Management's focus in 2026 is on stabilizing revenue through successful launches of the L9 Livis flagship model and the i6/i8 BEV lineup while expanding the overall product portfolio and international markets.
